acceptance_conditions.statement: Exactly three owner-accepted mode profiles are retained and none is ranked, selected over another, or superseded.
Each mode keeps its accepted causal carrier, update/read path, intervention family, and realization class without cross-mode rewrite.
Every H-L02-OP-01 through H-L02-OP-09 has one pointer to each of the three accepted mode contracts.
Producer assistance remains limited to the accepted missing active-history machinery and never computes success or the later response.
Restoration ownership remains native-v2 for state-carried and paired native-v2 plus adapter identity for history-carried and hybrid.
All six I03BR1 and eight I03CR1 downstream obligations remain traceable and none is silently discharged.
All I03 fixture inputs, observations, outcomes, comparators, branch/topology identities, and digests remain mechanically quarantined from I04/I06.
I04 must import all three profiles unchanged and mode-indexed; any shared artifact requires explicit semantic-equivalence proof.
I03F performs no repeated source/capability review, model/runtime/reconstruction execution, scientific assignment, discriminator-gate passage, or automatic I04 authorization.

checks.finding: All eleven compact terminal authorities match the accepted baseline commit; retained conformance/closeout summaries remain exact and outcome-free.
checks.name: exact_terminal_authority_identity_and_accepted_entry

intervention_family: native P-only debit with H_P/M_H fixed
evidence.owner_acceptance_authority: owner direction opening section 8.1 after P2-I2-DEC-017

evidence.reclassification_trigger: If I06 cannot realize native write diversion, carrier debit, or private-partition matching without an RCAE causal state transition, reopen I03A and reclassify before calibration or execution.
evidence.selection_rationale: Every causal pool mutation and response transition is performed by admitted public PyGRC operations. RCAE declares roles, access scope, schedules registered native calls, pairs branches, and asserts control guards, but it does not reduce contributor records into the pool, author the later response, or retain an external causal pool variable.

evidence.reclassification_trigger: If the adapter cannot keep H_P independently restorable/intervenable, cannot materialize its readout without consulting contributor labels or response state, or must directly decide/schedule success rather than handing a carrier-scoped readout to the native response path, stop as missing_prerequisite before runtime evidence is accepted.
evidence.selection_rationale: PyGRC supplies native attributable packet events, ordered contact evidence, packet transport, live response nodes, the model-owned feedback producer, snapshots, reset, and v2 identity. The missing separable operation is an active common-history carrier plus source-label-invariant readout materialization. One RCAE adapter owns only that carrier transition, intervention surface, cursor, and native readout bridge. It never writes a success field, reads the response target, applies the response threshold, or directly authors the later A-to-B transition.

evidence.component_reuse_rule: Reuse the pre-runtime structural adapter class only. I03B fixture coefficient, amounts, times, thresholds, branch IDs, response observations, comparator, and evidence digests are prohibited I03C inputs.
evidence.reclassification_trigger: If the adapter must read P as a success input, compute the joint score, apply the response threshold, schedule the later response, or if P/H_P cannot be independently intervened and restored, stop as missing_prerequisite.
evidence.selection_rationale: The adapter supplies only active H_P, its cursor/interventions, deterministic R_H, and public native M_H materialization. PyGRC already owns causal state C_P=P, the joint P/M_H live-state read, every coherence mutation, threshold/polarity evaluation, later response schedule, and packet transition.

evidence.duty: I06 must preserve the frozen fixture's unique registered source-to-P path or add an explicit route/channel admission key; source/target membership is the current exact adapter filter.
R05 retention, capacity, and scientific access comparison remain I04/I06 and execution work.
I06 must bound branch/event counts and either retain these not-applicable lifecycle classes or register a new reviewed construction; no conformance fixture capacity may become scientific calibration.

I06 must expose the paired procedure as the only registered continuation interface and validate manifest component hashes explicitly; the conformance harness proves the governed path, not a generic atomic transaction API.

I04 and I06 validators must reject the I03B fixture coefficient, amounts/types/times, threshold, packet amount, branch IDs, response values, comparator, and evidence digest; only the pre-runtime fold family may be imported.

The common-profile initial composite digest is retained once as the deterministic fresh-fixture witness rather than duplicated per standard branch; private profiles are identified by their separate frozen configurations and fresh construction.
operationalize/register the complete qualitative 2x2 with exact held-fixed rules and no inherited conformance values
retain unique physical source-to-P routes or explicit non-label/non-digest route/channel admission key and bound token type identity
register neutral-contact matching across all scientifically relevant timing/support/opportunity fields or explicit stratification

expose only one manifest-validating paired load/reset continuation interface; add failure checks for partial/mismatched load, cross-pairing, one-sided/repeated reset, stale M_H, and wrong baseline/mask
bound history/event counts, overflow, P capacity, M_H/readout bounds, and native reservoir adequacy while retaining or separately reviewing lifecycle classes
implement machine rejection from every registry source/scope, exact value, branch/topology identity, observation, comparator, outcome, and digest including trivial serialization reuse
bind exact common/private role identity and reject P/H_P/M_H or adapter-baseline cross-load before continuation
verify all three accepted profiles, OP mappings, restoration ownership, quarantine, no ranking, mode-indexed I04, and semantic-equivalence requirements before passing only the discriminator gate
